target.title: refactor: route sdk session compatibility through accessor
target.body:
## What

Routes the plugin SDK and trusted plugin runtime session compatibility helpers through the storage-neutral session accessor seam while preserving the deprecated file-backed whole-store and transcript-file helpers for the pre-SQLite migration window.

## Why

This is part of Path 3 SQLite branch-by-abstraction work. The SDK/runtime compatibility surface still needs to behave for existing plugins, but new and migrated callers should go through entry-oriented accessor helpers instead of depending directly on `sessions.json` or transcript file paths.

Refs #88838.

## Changes

- Route SDK session helpers
- Route runtime session helpers
- Preserve deprecated compatibility
- Propagate write confirmation
- Document deprecation boundary
- Ratchet file-backed exports
- Refresh SDK API baseline

| File | Change |
|------|--------|
| `src/plugin-sdk/session-store-runtime.ts` | Routes SDK helpers through accessor |
| `src/plugins/runtime/runtime-agent.ts` | Routes runtime session helpers |
| `src/plugins/runtime/types-core.ts` | Documents runtime compatibility types |
| `src/plugin-sdk/config-runtime.ts` | Keeps compat exports aligned |
| `src/config/sessions/session-accessor.ts` | Preserves write-success option |
| `scripts/check-session-accessor-boundary.mjs` | Adds SDK file-backed export ratchet |
| `test/scripts/check-session-accessor-boundary.test.ts` | Covers the new ratchet |
| `src/plugin-sdk/*test.ts`, `src/plugins/runtime/index.test.ts` | Adds compatibility regressions |
| `docs/plugins/sdk-runtime.md`, `docs/plugins/sdk-subpaths.md` | Documents transition-only helpers |

## Testing

- `node scripts/check-session-accessor-boundary.mjs`
- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs test/scripts/check-session-accessor-boundary.test.ts src/plugin-sdk/session-store-runtime.test.ts src/plugin-sdk/config-runtime.test.ts src/plugins/runtime/index.test.ts`
- `node scripts/run-oxlint.mjs scripts/check-session-accessor-boundary.mjs test/scripts/check-session-accessor-boundary.test.ts`
- `pnpm exec oxfmt --check scripts/check-session-accessor-boundary.mjs test/scripts/check-session-accessor-boundary.test.ts src/plugin-sdk/session-store-runtime.ts src/plugins/runtime/runtime-agent.ts src/plugins/runtime/types-core.ts src/plugin-sdk/config-runtime.ts src/plugin-sdk/session-store-runtime.test.ts src/plugin-sdk/config-runtime.test.ts src/plugins/runtime/index.test.ts docs/plugins/sdk-runtime.md docs/plugins/sdk-subpaths.md`
- `git diff --check`
- `.agents/skills/autoreview/scripts/autoreview --mode branch --base upstream/main` — clean, no accepted/actionable findings

Not run: live gateway proof. This slice preserves SDK/runtime helper behavior and CI ratchets; it does not change a gateway-visible user flow.
target.author: jalehman
